_comment: HATS-857 — file extensions that make wt_gate.py nudge when edited in the MAIN checkout. Grouped by language so it stays editable. Add/remove a group or an extension to tune it for your project; point AI_HATS_WT_GATE_EXTS at a copy of this file to override per-process. Keep wt_gate.py's embedded _DEFAULT_LANGS in sync (a wiring test asserts they match).
